testProduct: Configurable Hat ($15.00 base, 4 sections: Radio, Radio, Text, File)
testDataNote: CSV references 'Bike with options' (SKU: CVQ-54616437) which does NOT exist on QA. Tests adapted to use existing 'Configurable Hat' product. CFG-E2E tests require admin product creation - not feasible in this session without admin catalog access.

results.title: Configurable Product PDP Renders Configuration Widget Correctly
results.notes: Tested with Configurable Hat. Widget renders correctly: 'Configure the parameters' header, 4 accordion sections (Select your fav color, Select print-ready cap, Customize text for your cap, Add photo), radio options with None selected by default, qty stepper at 0, price $15.00.

results.title: Selecting Radio Option Updates Total Price Immediately
results.notes: Selecting Beige hat ($500) updated price from $15 to $515 immediately. Selecting S print ($11) updated to $526. Price updates are instant with no page reload.

results.title: Each Option Row Displays Unit Price Quantity and Extended Price
results.notes: Each radio option row shows: product image, product name (link), unit price, qty spinbutton (disabled, shows pre-set qty), and extended price. Extended price = unit price x qty for all options.

results.title: Sale Price Shown as Primary Price with List Price Strikethrough
results.notes: Tested with 'Hoodie Base product with only File req' (slug: physical-1703). Shows $300.00 strikethrough and $250.00 sale price. -17% discount badge visible on product image.

results.title: Quantity Stepper Starts at Zero and Controls Add to Cart Enable State
results.notes: Qty stepper initializes at 0. Decrease button disabled at 0. Clicking increase to 1 enables add-to-cart (item added). Decreasing back to 0 disables again.

results.title: Add Configured Product to Cart with Option Selected (Happy Path)
results.notes: Selected Green hat ($18) on Configurable Hat. Total = $33.00 ($15 + $18). Set qty to 1, item added to cart. Cart icon updated to show count. Cart page shows Configurable Hat at $33.00 with configuration details.

results.title: Add Configured Product to Cart with None Selected (Optional Section)
results.notes: None selected by default, all sections optional. Subtitle shows 'Personalize your selection further (optional)'. Add to cart with None succeeds at base price $15.00. No validation error.

results.title: Accordion Expands and Collapses Correctly
results.notes: Clicking section header collapses radio options (hidden). Clicking again expands. Selection state preserved through collapse/expand cycles.

results.title: Accordion Subtitle Updates to Show Selected Option Name
results.notes: Selecting Beige hat changes subtitle from 'Personalize your selection further (optional)' to 'Beige hat'. Selecting S print shows 'S print'. Custom text shows the entered text 'QA Test 2026'. Selecting None reverts to default subtitle.

results.title: No Auto-Scroll on Radio Button Click (VCST-4612 Regression)
results.notes: Clicking radio options does not cause page scroll jump. Verified across multiple option selections. VCST-4612 regression check passed.

results.title: Cart Shows Configured Product with Option Details and Correct Prices
results.notes: Cart shows Configurable Hat with: product name, configuration properties (Color, Size, Fabric from selected option), price per item, quantity, line total. 'Components list' dropdown available to see full configuration details.

results.title: Checkout Completes Successfully with Configured Product
results.notes: Configured product (Configurable Hat with Beige hat + S print + custom text 'QA Test 2026') at $526.00 added to cart. Selected shipping (Fixed Rate Ground $150) and Manual payment (PO: QA-CFG-TEST-2026). Order placed successfully. Order CO260309-00008 created with total $811.20 (subtotal $526 + tax $135.20 + shipping $150).

results.title: Order History Displays Configured Product with Option Details
results.notes: Order CO260309-00008 visible in order history. Order detail shows: Configurable Hat with properties (Color: Green/dark-forest, Size: 36, Fabric: Cotton), price $526.00, qty 1. Components list button present. Status: New. Total: $811.20.

results.title: Price Calculation Accuracy for All Option Combinations
results.notes: Tested multi-section price calculation: Base $15 + Beige hat $500 + S print $11 + Custom text $0 = $526.00. Price updates correctly as each section option is selected/deselected. Text sections do not affect price. Formula: base + sum(selected option extended prices).

results.title: Cross-Browser: Configuration Widget on Firefox
results.notes: Skipped per instructions: 'Use ONLY playwright-edge browser server.' Firefox cross-browser test not in scope for this run.

results.title: Out-of-Stock Option Indicated and Non-Selectable
results.notes: No configurable product with OOS options found in QA environment. All options on Configurable Hat are in stock. Would need admin to set an option's inventory to 0 to verify this behavior. Verified related behavior: required file section blocks add-to-cart with proper validation message 'Sorry, this product cannot be added to cart. Check your product configuration'.

results.title: E2E: Create Bike Product with Single Optional Radio Section in Admin and Verify on Storefront
results.notes: Requires admin product creation in VC Admin SPA. Not feasible in this storefront-only session. The equivalent storefront-side behavior was verified with existing Configurable Hat product.

results.title: E2E: Optional Section Allows Add-to-Cart Without Upgrade Selected
results.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-001 product. Equivalent behavior verified via CFG-PDP-007 with existing Configurable Hat (optional sections allow None selection + add-to-cart).

results.title: E2E: Selected Upgrade Option Reflected in Cart Line Item
results.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-001 product. Equivalent behavior verified via CFG-PDP-006 and CFG-PDP-011.

results.title: E2E: Create Laptop with Two Required Sections and Verify Multi-Section Price Math
results.notes: Requires admin product creation with two Required sections. Not feasible in this session.

results.title: E2E: Required Sections Block Add-to-Cart When Unselected
results.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-004 product. Verified related behavior: required file section on 'Hoodie Base File Req' shows 'Section is required' validation and error notification when add-to-cart attempted without file upload.

results.title: E2E: Price Math for All 9 Multi-Section Combinations Is Correct
results.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-004 product. Multi-section price math verified with Configurable Hat (4 sections, multiple options selected simultaneously).

results.title: E2E: Multi-Section Configuration Preserved in Cart
results.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-004 product. Verified with Configurable Hat: multi-section configuration (Beige hat + S print + custom text) preserved in cart with correct $526.00 price.

results.title: E2E: Sale Price and Strikethrough List Price on Configurable Product
results.notes: Requires admin product creation with sale prices. Sale price display verified via CFG-PDP-004 on existing 'Hoodie Base File Req' product.

results.title: E2E: Out-of-Stock Option Disabled and Required Section Blocks Purchase When All Options OOS
results.notes: Requires admin product creation with OOS options. Not feasible without admin access.

results.title: E2E: Full Purchase Flow with Configurable Product
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. Equivalent full purchase flow verified via CFG-PDP-012 + CFG-PDP-013 with existing Configurable Hat through checkout to order history.

results.title: E2E: Multiple Configurable Products in One Checkout
results.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-001 and CFG-E2E-004 products.

results.title: E2E: Cart Quantity Update Recalculates Line Total and Preserves Configuration
results.notes: Depends on CFG-E2E-001 product.

results.title: E2E: Edit Option Price in Admin and Verify Updated Price on Storefront
results.notes: Requires admin price editing. Not feasible in storefront-only session.

results.title: E2E: Delete Option in Admin and Verify It Disappears from Storefront
results.notes: Requires admin catalog editing.

results.title: E2E: Delete Entire Configuration Section in Admin and Verify Widget Updates on Storefront
results.notes: Requires admin catalog editing.

results.title: E2E: Deleting Last Section Removes Configuration Widget from PDP Entirely
results.notes: Requires admin catalog editing.

results.title: E2E: Create Product with Required Text Section and Verify Text Input on Storefront
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. Text section behavior verified with existing Configurable Hat 'Customize text for your cap' section (custom text input, predefined text options, text preserved in cart).

results.title: E2E: Required Text Section Blocks Add-to-Cart When Field Is Empty
results.notes: Requires admin product creation with required text section. Required section validation verified on 'Hoodie Base File Req' (required file section).

results.title: E2E: Create Product with Optional Text Section and Verify Empty and Filled Scenarios
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. Optional text behavior verified with Configurable Hat's optional text section.

results.title: E2E: Custom Engraving Text Preserved Through Cart and Checkout to Order History
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. Text preservation through checkout verified implicitly - custom text 'QA Test 2026' was part of the configuration that went through checkout in CFG-PDP-012.

results.title: E2E: Create Product with Required File Upload Section and Verify Upload on Storefront
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. File upload UI verified on existing 'Hoodie Base File Req' product (upload area, accepted formats, file size limits).

results.title: E2E: Required File Section Blocks Add-to-Cart When No File Is Uploaded
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. However, this exact behavior WAS verified on existing 'Hoodie Base File Req': attempting add-to-cart without file shows 'Section is required' validation and 'Sorry, this product cannot be added to cart. Check your product configuration' error notification.

results.title: E2E: Create Product with Optional File Section and Verify Empty and Uploaded Scenarios
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. Optional file section exists on Configurable Hat ('Add photo' section) but was not tested with actual file upload due to file_upload tool limitations.

results.title: E2E: Uploaded File Preserved Through Cart and Checkout to Order History
results.notes: Requires admin product creation and file upload.

results.title: E2E: Create Product with All Three Section Types (Radio + Text + File) and Verify All Sections in Widget
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. All three section types already verified on existing Configurable Hat which has Radio (colors), Radio (prints), Text (custom text), and File (add photo) sections.

results.title: E2E: Mixed Sections Full Checkout with All Sections Filled
results.notes: Requires admin product creation. Full checkout with mixed sections verified via CFG-PDP-012 using Configurable Hat (Radio + Radio + Text sections filled, checkout completed).

results.title: E2E: Admin Changes Section From Required to Optional and Verify Storefront Updates
results.notes: Requires admin catalog editing.

results.title: E2E: Cleanup — Delete All Test Products Created During E2E Testing
results.notes: No test products were created (E2E tests blocked). No cleanup needed.

results.title: E2E: Cleanup — Delete Test Category Created During E2E Testing
results.notes: No test category was created. No cleanup needed.

consoleErrors.message: Failed to load resource: 404 for skinny_md.png image
consoleErrors.impact: None - missing product thumbnail in 'Customers bought together' section

consoleErrors.message: Failed to load resource: 404 for BrownJeans_md.png image

keyFindings: All 14 executed PDP-level tests PASSED with 0 failures
Configuration widget renders correctly with all section types (Radio, Text, File)
Price calculation is accurate: base + sum of selected option extended prices
Multi-section configuration preserved through add-to-cart, cart, checkout, and order history
Full checkout flow with configured product completed successfully (Order CO260309-00008)
Required file section properly blocks add-to-cart with clear validation messaging
Subtitle dynamically updates to show selected option name
Sale price with strikethrough displays correctly on configurable products
29 CFG-E2E tests BLOCKED due to admin product creation dependency - these require a separate session with admin catalog access
recommendations: Schedule a dedicated E2E session with admin access to execute CFG-E2E-001 through CFG-E2E-029
Create persistent test configurable products in QA to reduce dependency on admin catalog for future regressions
The 'Bike with options' product referenced in the CSV (SKU: CVQ-54616437) does not exist on QA - update CSV or create the product
